modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access department calendar on macOS.

full_description_text:
- User is trying to access the department calendar on their Mac.  
- They cannot find the calendar through the path: All Public Folders/USD/MyDepartment.  
- User does not want to go back to the old version of outlook.  
- They still don’t have access to the calendar.
